betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ArchitectureCraft§f

§aBreak free from rigid square designs and carve custom shapes!§f
If you want to construct sloped roofs, round arches, classical pillars, spheres, or custom columns, §9ArchitectureCraft§f provides the tools to reshape standard blocks into architectural masterpieces without losing their textures.

§6Sculpting Tools & Workbench§f:
§b• Architect's Sawbench§f: The central machine. Insert a standard block (like wood, stone, or glass) to carve it into slopes, pillars, steps, or arches without losing the block's texture.
§b• Architect's Hammer§f: A handy tool used to §arotate and align§f the reshaped blocks easily once placed in the world.
§b• Architect's Chisel§f: Allows you to safely pick up fragile blocks (such as glass, panes, or glowstone) §awithout breaking them§f by §9right-clicking§f them.

§eTip§f: Reshaped blocks retain their original texture properties, letting you seamlessly blend custom arches into existing wooden or concrete factory walls.
